en.metaTitle: Hsin-Hsin Yuan | Documentary Director & AI-Language Creative
en.metaDescription: International portfolio of Hsin-Hsin Yuan, a documentary director, cross-cultural storyteller, and AI-language creative.
en.name: Hsin-Hsin Yuan
en.heroSubcopy: I build human stories across documentary, culture, technology, and language. My work moves between film sets, interviews, platforms, and AI-assisted creative workflows.
en.aboutLead: I am a Taiwan-born documentary director and creative producer working across factual entertainment, cultural projects, branded stories, and AI-assisted language workflows.
en.aboutBody: My work often begins with research and listening: finding the human signal inside a complicated topic, shaping it for an international audience, and building the production structure that helps it travel. I am especially interested in stories where culture, technology, language, and lived experience meet.
aboutNotes: Available for documentary, branded factual, cultural, and AI-language collaborations.
Experienced across Taiwan, Shanghai, Europe, and international production teams.
Bilingual editorial judgment in English and Chinese.
en.labSubcopy: A living space for vibe coding, fact-checked short-form scripts, language judgment, and AI-assisted production workflows.
en.archiveSubcopy: Earlier television, scripted, factual, and international collaboration work with platform performance and funding context.
en.createSubcopy: A practical menu for collaborators, brands, producers, studios, and teams looking for story-driven work with cultural and technical fluency.

services.title: Documentary films
services.line: Human stories with cultural and emotional precision.

services.title: Cross-cultural production
services.line: Taiwan, Shanghai, Europe, and international teams.

services.title: Technology stories
services.line: Founders, AI, deep tech, and the people behind systems.

services.title: AI-language workflows
services.line: Scripts, prompts, skills, and judgment systems.

en.workWithMeSubcopy: I can join early development, sharpen a story, direct interviews, build research-backed short-form formats, or design AI-assisted writing workflows for teams.

workModes.title: Story development
workModes.line: Research, treatment, pitch framing, and narrative structure for factual and cultural projects.

workModes.title: Production direction
workModes.line: Interview-led directing, field production, and cross-cultural creative coordination.

workModes.title: Branded factual content
workModes.line: Short-form series, campaign stories, founder profiles, and educational content with verification built in.

workModes.title: AI creative systems
workModes.line: Codex + Claude assisted workflows for scripts, research checks, language learning, and repeatable content formats.

en.contactTitle: Let’s build a story with signal.
en.contactSubcopy: For documentary, cultural, branded, AI-language, and cross-cultural production collaborations. Send a brief note about the project, timeline, and what kind of partner you need.

zh.metaTitle: 袁欣欣 | 紀錄片導演與 AI 語言創作者
zh.metaDescription: 袁欣欣的國際作品集：紀錄片導演、跨文化創作者、AI 語言與創作流程實驗者。
zh.name: 袁欣欣
zh.heroSubcopy: 我創作關於人、文化、科技與語言的故事。工作現場從紀錄片拍攝、訪談、平台內容，到 AI 輔助的創作流程。
zh.aboutLead: 我是來自台灣的紀錄片導演與創意製作人，工作橫跨紀實娛樂、文化專案、品牌故事，以及 AI 輔助的語言與劇本工作流。
zh.aboutBody: 我的創作通常從研究與聆聽開始：在複雜題目裡找出人的訊號，整理成能被國際觀眾理解的敘事，並建立讓專案能順利拍攝、溝通與交付的製作結構。我特別關心文化、科技、語言與真實經驗交會的故事。
aboutNotes: 開放紀錄片、品牌紀實、文化內容與 AI 語言工作流合作。
具台灣、上海、歐洲與國際團隊合作經驗。
可用中文與英文進行研究、採訪、劇本與敘事判斷。
zh.labSubcopy: 放置 vibe coding、資料驗證型短影音劇本、語言判斷與 AI 輔助製作流程的空間。
zh.archiveSubcopy: 整理早期電視、戲劇、科學節目、國際合作與具平台成績的作品。
zh.createSubcopy: 給製作人、品牌、文化單位、內容團隊與需要跨語境故事能力的合作方，一個比較清楚的合作入口。

services.title: 紀錄片
services.line: 以人為核心，處理文化與情感的細節。

services.title: 跨文化製作
services.line: 台灣、上海、歐洲與國際團隊合作經驗。

services.title: 科技故事
services.line: 創業者、AI、深科技，以及系統背後的人。

zh.workWithMeSubcopy: 我可以加入前期開發、協助故事定位、執導訪談與拍攝、設計資料驗證型短影音格式，或替團隊建立 AI 輔助寫作流程。

workModes.title: 故事開發
workModes.line: 研究、企劃、pitch framing、敘事架構與紀實題材整理。

workModes.title: 拍攝與導演
workModes.line: 訪談導向的導演工作、現場製作與跨文化創意協調。

workModes.title: 品牌紀實內容
workModes.line: 短影音系列、campaign story、創辦人故事、具資料驗證的教育內容。

workModes.title: AI 創作系統
workModes.line: 用 Codex + Claude 建立劇本、查證、語言學習與可重複內容格式的工作流。

zh.contactTitle: 一起做一個有訊號的故事。
zh.contactSubcopy: 紀錄片、文化內容、品牌短影音、AI 語言與跨文化製作合作洽詢。來信可以簡單說明專案、時程，以及你需要哪一種合作角色。
